scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run build:bootstrap
scripts.lint: chant lint src/app && chant lint src/bootstrap
scripts.install-argocd: kubectl create namespace argocd --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - && kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2.13.3/manifests/install.yaml && kubectl -n argocd wait deploy/argocd-server --for=condition=Available --timeout=180s
scripts.status: kubectl -n argocd get application web -o wide
